name: Option list

variants.name: single_select
variants.description: User selects one item. No checkboxes. Icons optional.

variants.name: multi_select
variants.description: User selects multiple items. Shows checkboxes. No icons.

variants.name: actions
variants.description: List of actions. All items must have icons.

searchable.note: Shows search field at top of list

trigger.note: The UI element that expands the list

dividers.note: Index positions where dividers are placed between items

trigger_gap.note: Gap between trigger and option list

positioning.fallback: above trigger when insufficient space below
positioning.horizontal_with_button: determined by widest item, aligned to right

usage_rules.detail: In multi-select variant, do not show icons on items. Checkboxes are shown instead.

usage_rules.rule: Actions variant must have icons on all items
usage_rules.detail: If the option list represents actions, every item must have an icon. Do not mix items with and without icons.
List most common options first, or follow a logical order meaningful to the user.
All item labels must use sentence case. Never title case or all caps.
Keep item labels and sublabels short. Only provide a sublabel if it genuinely adds value.

usage_rules.rule: Already included in Dropdown and Button
usage_rules.detail: Option list is bundled inside Dropdown and Button components. You typically do not add it separately.

confidence_blockers: If ticket requests multi_select with icons, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket requests actions variant with some items missing icons, flag.
If ticket does not specify trigger type (dropdown vs button), ask for clarification — positioning differs.

embedding_text: Option list component. Dropdown menu action menu select list context menu overflow menu. Variants: single select, multi select with checkboxes no icons, actions all items have icons. Triggered by dropdown or button. Position below trigger or above if no space. Sentence case labels. Includes search field optionally.
